content.en:
The body of the Phantom Clan was copied, and Ye Tian acted with the body of the Phantom Clan.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled to the vicinity of the Spirit Yuan Realm, and then urged the innate ability of the Illusory Shadow Clan-Void Escape!

Ye Tian's body has a legendary-level void escape, which is formed by fusing a large number of legendary-level void escapes.

Moreover, Ye Tian also created a space-time supreme technique based on the legendary-level Void Escape-Shadowless Void Escape!

Ye Tian had never cast Shadowless Void, so even if he did, no one would know.

If he didn't cast the Shadowless Void Escape, he would not be able to sneak into the Spirit Cloud Realm in an instant, and quickly take the items he needed before leaving, after all, Lord Lei Yan was a fourth-level Legendary Realm Lord.

If he didn't have enough strength, he wouldn't be able to escape from this replica body.

Wow!

Ye Tian immediately cast a shadowless void, and his body completely disappeared, as if it no longer existed.

He ignored the many formations of the Spirit Yuan Realm and infiltrated in.

Although this replica body does not have a replication talent, it is also a replica body formed by a replication talent, so there is still a little sense of that treasure, plus the cooperation of the body.

After Ye Tian came in, he quickly locked the location of the treasure.

The center of the Spirit Metaverse.

A small purple sacred grass grows here, and it is surrounded by a prohibition.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared here, staring at the purple divine grass, his heart was extremely excited, this was the treasure it needed.

He directly smashed the prohibition, then plucked the purple divine grass, and immediately cast the Shadowless Void Escape at the fastest speed, escaping from the Spirit Yuan Realm.

And for the first time, several Legendary Realm Lords who guarded the Spirit Metaverse sensed it and wanted to stop it, but they couldn't stop it at all, and they couldn't even intercept it.

They can't stop the Temporal Supreme Technique, so they can only call for help immediately.

Rumble!!!

A clone of Lord Thunder Flame will descend.

And at this time, Ye Tian had already fled, and he was just a moment away.

After Ye Tian's Illusory Clan's copy body merged with his own copy body, the Phantom Clan's copy body immediately annihilated itself, and Ye Tian returned to the Infinite 1L with this purple divine grass.

Then, Ye Tian immediately began to refine and swallow this purple divine grass.

The purple divine grass turned into special energy and poured into the replication body, and began to improve the realm of the replication talent.

The other side.

Lord Lei Yan took a step in the evening, and did not track down Ye Tian, and was immediately annoyed.

So, he spied on Shi Mian to find Ye Tian, and quickly confirmed Ye Tian's identity.

"It's ...... Phantom Clan.?"

Lord Lei Yan was stunned.

Others don't know about the Lan tribe, he knows!

But the Illusory Clan is not a creature in the Void Region, how could it appear here, and it also infiltrated the Spirit Yuan Realm.

Subsequently, he investigated and found that only one treasure had been lost in the Spirit Yuan Realm.

"Tianzi Yuancao!"

The value of the Heavenly Purple Yuan Grass is very high, so it is one of the several Kui treasures that the Spirit Yuan Realm focuses on cultivating, although it is of little use to him, it is of great value to the Lei Yan Holy Land.

However, what did the Phantom Clan do when they stole the Heavenly Purple Yuan Grass?

Moreover, the wisdom of the Phantom Clan should be very low, but that Phantom Clan can also have the highest skill in time and space, which is extremely strange!

"Could it be ......"

Lord Lei Yan guessed a possibility, maybe it was a peak Legendary Realm lord who captured a Phantom Clan, thus controlling the Phantom Clan in some way, or simply refining the Phantom Clan into a special clone of his own.

This special doppelganger is difficult to create, but it can still be created.

If that's the case, then the goal can be narrowed down by a bit.

"The white-bearded old man wouldn't do this, it shouldn't be him. "

"Lord Yunsen has fallen, so naturally it's not him. "

"The Lord of Yonghe of the Blue Lotus Holy Land, the Lord of Tianque of the Time and Space Chamber of Commerce, the Lord of the Boundary Glass of the Realm God Pavilion, or the Old Monster of the Five Elements?"

In my impression, there were only a few fourth-level peak Legendary Realm lords who remained in the Void Region.

As for the peak legend lord of the fifth level, it is extremely mysterious, even if he stays in the void area, it is impossible to do this.

As for the third-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, he didn't consider this possibility, because it was unlikely that the other party would know about the existence of the Illusory Clan.

Of course, it is also possible that it has nothing to do with the peak Legendary Realm Lord, it is purely a certain Illusory Clan infiltrating here, and it happens that the Heavenly Purple Yuan Grass has a great attraction to the Illusory Clan, thus causing the Illusory Clan to steal it.

A mere Illusory Clan has too little influence, and it is difficult for him to contact the Eternal Master, so there is no way to report it.

"If I succeed in joining the Temple of Eternity, I can report it to the Eternal Masters at any time, and the Eternal Masters will know what the situation is as soon as they find out. "

Lord Lei Yan muttered.

It's a pity that he is only one step away from joining the Eternal Palace, but even if he is only one step away, the Eternal Hall will not accept him.

Of course, he could still use the power of the Temple of Eternity to leave the Void Zone, but he couldn't come back.

With only one Heavenly Purple Yuan Grass lost, Lord Lei Yan didn't care very much.

He told the Lords of the Legendary Realm to be more vigilant, and then left the place.

At the same time, he spread the news of the appearance of the Phantom Clan to several other fourth-level peak Legendary Realms, and as for how the other Peak Legendary Realm lords would react, then he didn't know.

But the biggest possibility is that no one cares.

Time passed slowly, and nothing was discovered, which made Ye Tian breathe a sigh of relief.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally refined the Heavenly Purple Yuan Grass thoroughly.

At the same time, his talent for copying has finally reached a whole new level.

Then, Ye Tian began to continue to copy the control-level Destruction Ancestral Fu.

Originally, the copying process of the card owner was finally able to be copied slowly after copying (Li's) talent upgrade.

1%，

2%，

3%，

Gradually, the mastery-level destruction ancestral endowment was finally completely copied by Ye Tian, which was also the first control-level ancestral endowment on Ye Tian's body.

Having a mastery-level Destruction Ancestral Endowment was of too great significance to Ye Tian, and he even had the hope of creating a space-time control technique in advance.

No, even if he created the fur of the space-time control technique, then he still had the hope of having the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord combat power.

Moreover, if he creates the space-time control technique, it will also help him quickly fuse time and space, so that the power of the whole body can be transformed into the power of space-time control.

Therefore, obtaining this mastery-level destruction ancestral endowment is a great opportunity for Ye Tian!

Next, he will go all out to create a space-time control technique, and even if he can't create it, he will have to create a little fur altar. "

Ye Tian muttered. _
